title: Inspection Depth
documentation:
## Purpose
A qualitative selector that controls how thoroughly a machine examines its input. The three levels (`summary`, `detailed`, `full`) trade off speed and token usage against completeness of analysis.

## When to use
Use `summary` for quick triage or routing decisions. Use `detailed` for standard analysis where most relevant content should be surfaced. Use `full` when exhaustive inspection is required, such as compliance review or deep extraction tasks.

## Notes
Allowed values: `summary`, `detailed`, `full`. For numeric depth control in hierarchical documents, use [Outline Max Depth](https://capdag.com/browse/media:outline-max-depth;textable;numeric). The computational cost typically scales with depth level.
